parsed.global_notes: Triage completed for 100 challenge spectra. Top candidates show strong localized excesses, particularly around the 1550nm telecom band, with high signal-to-noise ratios and excellent aperture-PSF agreement.

top_candidates.reason: Strong localized excess at 1550nm with high SNR and excellent aperture-PSF agreement.
Clear spectral line signature with robust support across multiple frames.
Significant flux peak matching expected telecom band profile.
Consistent localized excess with minimal competing peaks.
Good signal-to-noise ratio and clean baseline subtraction.
Prominent emission feature with high confidence detection.
Strong candidate matching safe anchor template parameters.
Clear localized peak with low artifact likelihood.
Consistent spectral profile across multiple detectors.
Moderate localized excess with acceptable noise levels.
